name: Gainsight (Customer Success Platform)
description: Central CS platform for health scoring, automated workflows, playbooks, and customer lifecycle management.

name: Automated Onboarding Flows
description: Sequential, trigger-based onboarding emails and in-app guidance that activate users within the first 14 days.

name: NPS Survey Automation
description: Automated NPS collection at key lifecycle milestones with real-time alerts for detractors.

name: Zendesk AI Agents
description: AI-powered chatbots and agent assist features within Zendesk to reduce first response time and deflect common tickets.

name: Customer Health Score Model
description: Predictive health scoring based on product usage, support tickets, NPS, and account data to flag at-risk accounts.

name: ChurnZero
description: Real-time customer success platform with in-app messaging, usage monitoring, and automated retention campaigns.

name: Customer Communities (Vanilla Forums)
description: Community platform for customers to share best practices, vote on features, and find answers peer-to-peer.

name: Expansion Revenue Analytics
description: Framework for identifying upsell and cross-sell opportunities based on usage patterns and account demographics.

name: Intercom (Messaging Platform)
description: Moving away from Intercom in favor of Zendesk for unified support. Existing automation needs to be migrated.

name: Product-Led Expansion
description: Letting product usage naturally drive upgrades and expansion through feature gating, usage-based pricing, and in-app upgrade flows.

name: API for Customer Health Data
description: GraphQL API exposing customer health scores, usage metrics, and risk flags to internal tools and dashboards.

name: Renewal Forecasting (ML)
description: Machine learning model predicting renewal probability per account, fed into Gainsight for proactive CS intervention.
